scenes.title: Story opening
scenes.source_excerpt:
Find dropshipping product candidates for the US market from this broad category.

[PASTE BROAD CATEGORY HERE]

Examples:
- mỹ phẩm cho nữ
- mỹ phẩm cho nam
- đồ trang điểm
- sleep products
- posture products
- pet products
- car accessories
- home organization
- pain relief products

Do not ask me for a specific product.
Use live web search. Do not rely only on assumptions.

Before filling Product Link or FB Ads Competitor link, actively search the web.
scenes.summary: Find dropshipping product candidates for the US market from this broad category. [PASTE BROAD CATEGORY HERE] Examples: - mỹ phẩm cho nữ - mỹ phẩm cho nam - đồ trang điểm - sleep products - posture products - pet products - car accessories - home organization - pain relief product

scenes.title: Story development
scenes.source_excerpt:
For every product candidate, try to find:
- one product/supplier link from Amazon, Alibaba, AliExpress, Walmart, Shopify store, or another accessible source
- one competitor brand or store
- one Meta/Facebook Ads Library link if publicly accessible

Only write "Need research" after attempting live search.

Start from the category, generate US English seed keywords, search/reason through competitor products, filter weak products, and return the best product candidates.

Follow this process:

1. Convert my category into US English seed keywords.
2. Search or identify relevant products from:
   -

scenes.title: Story conclusion
scenes.source_excerpt:
Return exactly these columns:

Product name | Product image | Product Link | USP | Niches/ Customer Pain point/ Desire | FB Ads Competitor link (Brands Ads library) | Ads lâu nhất | Note

- Return only the spreadsheet-friendly table.
- Do not write a long explanation.
- Do not ask me which product to research.
- Do not invent links, ad dates, prices, COGS, search volume, or review data.
- If live data is unavailable, write "Need live research".
- If competitor ad data is unavailable, write "Need Meta Ads Library check".
- If supplier data is unavailable, write "Need supplier validation".
- Eac
